title: Fix the buildah version command
body:
Fix the buildah version command output in buildah v1.4

It fails with below error:
~~~
[root@host ~]# buildah version
strconv.ParseInt: parsing "": invalid syntax
[root@host ~]# rpm -q buildah
buildah-1.4-2.git608fa84.el8+2005+c789302b.x86_64
~~~

Signed-off-by: Suresh Gaikwad <sgaikwad@redhat.com>

comments.body: @rhatdan Can you take a look at this one?

LGTM
@TomSweeneyRedHat Something up with make vaildate?

@rhatdan I'm not aware of any Make validate command.
I though this had already been fixed and how are you fixing in 1.4 when we're looking at v1.5 and 1.6-dev now?
Yes I see it to.  This is already in the upstream and the latest buildah release.
